name: Week 1 Legs (Quads/Hamstrings/Glutes/Calves)
description: Foundation leg day grouped by station — squat rack for squats and RDLs, leg press for quads and calves, leg curl machine, then dumbbells for lunges. Minimizes moving around a crowded gym. All fixed exercises.

exercises.notes: Full depth, arms in front for balance
Bodyweight walking lunges, feel the stretch
Barbell back squat. Below parallel, chest up, drive through heels. Main lift — add weight when you hit 4×8.
Same bar, strip some weight. Slow descent, feel hamstrings stretch, squeeze glutes at top.
Feet shoulder-width, mid-platform. Full depth without butt lifting.
Same machine — feet low on platform, toes only. Full stretch at bottom, squeeze at top.
Full range of motion, squeeze at peak contraction, slow 2-second negative.
Walking or reverse. Dumbbells at sides. Control the descent, drive through front heel.

tips: Grouped by station — squat rack → leg press → leg curl → dumbbells
Squat rack: do squats AND RDLs here — same bar, just change the weight
Leg press: do calf raises here too — same machine, just move your feet down
Squat is your main lift — warm up with progressively heavier sets first
Rest 2 min between squat/RDL sets, 60s between everything else
Total volume: ~17 working sets for legs
